arguments.question: Can you describe the specific symptoms you've been experiencing and when they started?

clinical_turn.patient_or_tool_response: {'question': 'I’ve been having episodes of wheezing, shortness of breath, and chest tightness that come and go — sometimes a few times a week. They’re worse at night and when I’m active or exposed to cold air. I also cough a lot, especially when I’m around triggers like dust, pet dander, or perfumes. I’ve noticed my symptoms get worse after viral infections or stress. I’ve had trouble breathing during exercise and sometimes wake up gasping for air. I’ve also lost most of my sense of smell, which started around the same time my asthma symptoms got worse. I react badly to aspirin and ibuprofen — even small doses make me wheeze and feel like I’m choking. I’ve had nasal polyps and chronic sinus issues for years, and my asthma is hard to control with regular meds. I’ve been told I have severe asthma, and I’m often hospitalized when it flares up.'}
